title: Product Classification with Nested Categories
scenario: Write a prompt to classify a set of products into nested categories (electronics, electronics/computers, electronics/computers/laptops). The LLM output should be in the format of a hierarchical list with product name, category, and subcategory. Target output should include at least 15 products, with each product correctly classified into nested categories.
constraints: Must handle nested categories and hierarchical relationships.
Must be robust to varying product names and descriptions.
Must provide accurate categorization and subcategorization for each product.

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the LLM output conform to the expected JSON format?
Does the LLM correctly classify products into nested categories?
Does the LLM accurately determine subcategories for each product?
Does the LLM output cover all products and categories?
